rationale.D1: Confirmed a fully generalized IO base-class pattern (MotorIO, GyroIO, CameraIO, EncoderIO, LedIO, BitIO) with device-named hardware impls (MotorIOTalonFX/TalonFXS/SparkMax, GyroIOPigeon, CameraIOPhotonCamera, etc.) applied across every mechanism, plus base classes doubling as REPLAY null objects — this is a library-grade generic abstraction, not just per-subsystem interfaces.
rationale.D2: MultiCommands orchestrates shooter+LEDs via command composition but no Superstructure, no state machine, no WantedState or SystemState enum was found anywhere in the codebase — coordination is pure command-based (level 1).
rationale.D3: Confirmed DCMotorSim used in SwerveModuleSim, ShooterSim, and IntakeSim; VisionSim wires PhotonVision pose simulation; SwervePhysicsSim/IntakePhysicsSim/ShooterPhysicsSim connect to an external MuJoCo physics engine — drivetrain, mechanisms, and vision are all simulated.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists in the season repo, no @Test annotations found, and the two hal_harness hits were false positives from an unrelated pattern — no testing whatsoever.
rationale.D5: Confirmed @AutoLog inputs structs on all IO classes (MotorIO, GyroIO, CameraIO, EncoderIO, LedIO), Logger.processInputs called in every IO update(), Logger.recordOutput throughout subsystems, WPILOGWriter + NT4Publisher in Robot.java, and full REPLAY mode with WPILOGReader — AK coverage spans all mechanisms.
rationale.D6: Confirmed AutoBuilder.configure() wired up in RobotContainer with real PID constraints, 12 competition .auto files and 19+ .path files in deploy/pathplanner/, NamedCommands registered for intake/shooter/hang — strong PathPlanner adoption; no Choreo files present.
rationale.D7: Confirmed addVisionMeasurement with dynamic std-dev calculation based on distance, ambiguity, and tag count (single vs multi-tag), two CameraIOPhotonCamera instances fused in Swerve.periodic(), CameraIO interface with sim variant — fused filtered estimation; no TimeInterpolatableBuffer or standalone RobotState class found.
rationale.D8: Confirmed spotless Palantir formatter enforced via compileJava.dependsOn(spotlessApply), 5 seasons of repos, a library folder with templates/swerve/kitbot, and CLAUDE.md architecture docs — CI workflows exist in sibling repos (elastic lib) but not in the season repo itself.
